query: Analyze the logistics software market for enterprise transport fleets. Find key urgency triggers.
expected_behavior: Translates traditional fleet pains into specific operational metrics (fuel waste, route delay times, driver turnover rates)
Calculates proxy bottom-up SAM indicators if global TAM figures are not available
Pinpoints regulatory pressures (e.g., carbon standards or driving hour constraints) as major compliance EDPs
Ensures all links and references are formatted with forward slashes
Bans any em dashes in the output report
